name: qa-automation-portfolio
description: Dockerized QA automation framework featuring UI/API testing, CI/CD pipelines and Allure reporting.

scripts.test:parabank: node scripts/clean.js parabank && cross-env PROJECT=parabank node scripts/run-and-report.js parabank
scripts.test:restful-booker: node scripts/clean.js restful-booker && newman run 02_api/restful-booker/5_postman/collections/RFB-00 - Prerequisites.postman_collection.json --environment 02_api/restful-booker/5_postman/environments/RFB_Environment.postman_environment.json --export-environment /tmp/rfb_env.json --reporters cli,allure --reporter-allure-export 02_api/restful-booker/outputs/allure-results && newman run "02_api/restful-booker/5_postman/collections/RFB-01 - Create Booking.postman_collection.json" --environment /tmp/rfb_env.json --export-environment /tmp/rfb_env.json --reporters cli,allure --reporter-allure-export 02_api/restful-booker/outputs/allure-results --suppress-exit-code
scripts.test:automation-exercise: node scripts/clean.js automation-exercise && cross-env PROJECT=automation-exercise node scripts/run-and-report.js automation-exercise
scripts.test:all: npm run test:parabank && npm run test:restful-booker && npm run test:automation-exercise
